commands.review_summary:
The PR adds queue-pressure fallback observations, records cron model progress into detached task status, blocks model fallback while the Gateway is draining, and adds related docs.

PR surface: Source +119, Tests +252, Docs +165. Total +536 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this PR proposes new cron progress observability plus a runtime policy change. The after behavior is source-readable and unit-covered, but no live reproduction or real runtime proof is supplied.

target.title: feat(cron): surface fallback progress
target.body:
## Summary

- Stop model fallback from starting or continuing while the Gateway is draining for restart/shutdown.
- Add queue pressure fields to model fallback observations and surface cron primary/fallback progress into detached task run status.
- Thread cron task run ids through manual/isolated execution and document the production AI governance checklist.

## Verification

- PASS: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-fallback.test.ts src/process/command-queue.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.task-progress.test.ts` (181 tests)
- PASS: `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- PASS: `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/model-fallback.ts src/agents/model-fallback.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.task-progress.test.ts src/cron/service/ops.ts src/cron/service/timer.ts src/gateway/server-cron.ts src/agents/model-fallback-observation.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts src/cron/service/state.ts src/process/command-queue.test.ts`
- PASS: `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- PASS: `node scripts/docs-list.js` (log: `/tmp/openclaw-docs-list-84fbdc20.log`)

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Cron/background task status now receives primary model and fallback progress, including queue active/queued/draining causality; model fallback refuses to run while Gateway restart drain is active.
Real environment tested: Local macOS source checkout on branch `codex/active-task-observability-hotfix-main`, rebased onto `origin/main` at `97a8c09b`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-fallback.test.ts src/process/command-queue.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.task-progress.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`; targeted `oxfmt --check`; `node scripts/docs-list.js`.
Evidence after fix: Targeted tests passed with 181/181 tests, core test typecheck exited 0, targeted formatter exited 0, docs listing exited 0.
Observed result after fix: The new cron task-progress test records primary and fallback status updates; model fallback drain tests throw `GatewayDrainingError` before starting or continuing fallback; queue observation fields report active/queued/draining counts.
What was not tested: Full `pnpm` gates on latest `origin/main` were blocked before execution by upstream lockfile minimumReleaseAge policy for `lru-cache@11.5.1` published on 2026-05-27T15:04:12.732Z.
